nodes.label: Always restart PM2 after resurrect
nodes.rationale: PM2 resurrect restores saved processes but may use cached code. Always run pm2 restart all after a system restart to ensure latest code is loaded.

nodes.label: Shared cache architecture
nodes.rationale: Per-user Linux isolation causes massive storage duplication. Shared directories with symlinks eliminate duplication while maintaining isolation.

nodes.label: User isolation mechanism
nodes.rationale: Each user gets an isolated Linux system account with home directory permissions 750. OpenCode instances run as the user's system account.

nodes.label: Backend health check pattern
nodes.rationale: curl http://localhost:3000/api/health returns JSON status. Used in deployment verification and start scripts to confirm backend readiness.

nodes.label: Cloudflare tunnel access
nodes.rationale: Cloudflare tunnel provides external access to the local development environment using a shared service token.

nodes.label: KiroProcessManager
nodes.rationale: Spawns kiro-cli via sudo runuser for privilege separation. Uses --resume to continue the most recent session in the directory. Creates and chowns directory before file watcher starts.

nodes.label: SSEConnection
nodes.rationale: SSE consumer with auto-reconnect and 500-event buffer per session. Auto-approves permission requests to unblock tool calls. Idle-complete timer (30s) handles gaps between multi-step tool calls.

nodes.label: OpenCodeBridge
nodes.rationale: Uses SubscriptionManager per directory and SSE event buffering. Polls for completion as fallback. Tracks file operations via TOOL_TO_FILE_ACTION mapping and build artifact filtering.

nodes.label: OpenCodeProcessManager
nodes.rationale: Hard timeout (45s) on startup path guarantees a hung startup can never permanently deadlock the bridge. Uses runuser -l for privilege dropping and OPENCODE_DANGEROUSLY_SKIP_PERMISSIONS to prevent permission prompts.

nodes.label: KiroBridge
nodes.rationale: Streams kiro-cli stdout through KiroStreamFilter to strip metadata. File watcher provides accurate change detection since parser cannot reliably extract file ops from kiro output. Emits events via SessionEventBus.

nodes.label: SessionEventBus
nodes.rationale: Bridge-agnostic event bus. Buffers non-terminal events (up to 500) for late-joining SSE subscribers. Auto-cleans buffers 60s after last listener leaves.

nodes.label: KiroFileWatcher
nodes.rationale: Snapshot+delta file watcher that complements kiro-output-parser. Debounces rapid events (100ms) and ignores build artifacts. Final diff against initial snapshot catches changes missed by fs.watch.

nodes.label: useAuth
nodes.rationale: Gracefully handles 401 responses by returning null instead of throwing query errors. Uses 10-minute staleTime to reduce repeated auth checks. Syncs user to Zustand auth store via useEffect. Logout clears the entire React Query cache.

nodes.label: useIsMobile
nodes.rationale: Uses window.matchMedia API with max-width query for responsive breakpoint detection. Default breakpoint 768px. Initializes from window.innerWidth and listens to resize events with cleanup.

nodes.label: useStreamingAgent
nodes.rationale: Uses a mutable accumulator ref (not React state) to collect SSE events. Snapshots to React state on a 16ms interval for ~60fps smooth rendering. Clears accumulator and localStorage for terminal sessions (completed/failed/cancelled) to prevent duplicate message overlays.

nodes.label: processStreamEvent
nodes.rationale: Centralized SSE event reducer handling text-delta, thinking, file-op, question, todo, status, file-change, complete, and error events. Deduplicates file-op badges for same path+action. Pending transitions delay status changes by 600ms for visual feedback.

nodes.label: Fastify Server App
nodes.rationale: SPA fallback serves index.html for non-API routes. Production build served statically via fastifyStatic. Graceful shutdown stops OpenCode instances and releases port for PM2 restarts.

nodes.label: AgentExecutor
nodes.rationale: Preserves partial agent output on failure by appending error message. Cleans badge markers from bridge output. Stores bridge session IDs in DB for future message reuse.

nodes.label: calculateTokenCost
nodes.rationale: Applies 1.2x TOKEN_MULTIPLIER and TOKENS_PER_USD conversion for display pricing.

nodes.label: AppRoutes
nodes.rationale: Nested route architecture using layout components: RootLayout, PublicLayout, AppLayout, AdminLayout.
